narrative:
Google has released its March 2026 Pixel update, introducing significant new AI capabilities led by Gemini's agentic features that allow the assistant to perform tasks autonomously on behalf of users [1]. The flagship feature enables Gemini to complete work inside select apps, including ordering groceries through services like Grubhub and booking rides via Uber, while working in the background as users continue using their phones [1]. Google emphasizes that users can supervise or interrupt Gemini's work at any time [1].

The agentic Gemini feature was first demonstrated during Samsung's Unpacked event the previous week and is now rolling out to the Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro, and Pixel 10 Pro XL [1]. This capability will also be available on Samsung S26 phones, positioning it ahead of similar Siri features that have been delayed for months [1].

Beyond Gemini, Google has enhanced Circle to Search functionality across the entire Pixel 10 lineup, adding the ability to break down outfits and search for individual clothing pieces, plus a virtual try-on feature [1]. The company has also updated Magic Cue, which provides contextual suggestions across messaging, email, weather, and phone apps - for example, automatically suggesting restaurants when friends ask for recommendations based on their preferences [1]. Magic Cue is coming to Pixel 10 series devices and the Pixel 10 Pro Fold in select countries and languages [1].

Google is extending new features to older Pixel devices as well. Pixel 8 and newer models will gain a desktop experience when connected to external displays, while Pixel 7 and newer devices will receive enhanced At-a-Glance widget functionality for commute updates including departures, delays, and alternative routes [1]. Pixel 6 and newer devices are getting a Now Playing app for music identification, custom AI-generated app icons, and home/lockscreen widgets for sports scores and stock market prices [1]. The Pixel 10 series will also introduce a new 'comfort view' feature designed to reduce visual stimulation from bright or saturated colors [1].

citations.title: Google's latest Pixel drop allows Gemini to order groceries for you and more
citations.quote: Google is adding several new features to Pixel phones with its latest March update, including the ability for its Gemini AI assistant to do things for you, like order groceries or book a ride.

keyDevelopments: Google launches agentic Gemini AI that can autonomously perform tasks like ordering groceries and booking rides
New Gemini capabilities roll out to Pixel 10 series devices with user supervision controls
Circle to Search gains outfit breakdown and virtual try-on features across Pixel 10 lineup
Magic Cue receives contextual suggestion updates for restaurant recommendations and other scenarios
Older Pixel devices (6-8 series) receive various new features including desktop mode and enhanced widgets
Samsung S26 phones confirmed to receive similar Gemini agentic features
